name: openclaw-skill-viral-content-creator
description: Advanced multi-platform content generation and automation system. Generate 50+ viral videos from 1 product image with A/B testing, viral score prediction, and full autopilot mode. Better than POST AI with 5x more content and full automation.

openclaw.inspiration: Based on POST AI concept but with 5x more content, full automation, and advanced AI features

changelog: v2.0.0: Complete rewrite - Mass video generation (50+ from 1 image), A/B testing hooks, viral score prediction, full autopilot mode, PostBridge integration. Better than original POST AI concept with advanced features. POST AI: 10 videos, manual. Viral Content Creator: 50+ videos, fully automated.
